name: Herbed Breadsticks
recipeInstructions:
Combine 1-1/2 cups flour, yeast, sugar, basil, oregano, and salt in a large bowl. Add water and oil; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer for 3 to 4 minutes or until smooth. Stir in 1 cup Parmesan cheese, garlic, and enough flour to make a stiff dough. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface, and knead until smooth and elastic (about 1 minute). Divide dough into fourths; shape each into a ball. Cut each ball into 10 pieces.
Shape each piece into an 8-inch rope. Cover remaining dough while working to prevent drying. Dip rope in butter, and roll in Parmesan cheese. Place 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85°F), free from drafts, for 50 minutes. Dough will not double in bulk. Bake at 400°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Yield: 40 breadsticks.
